title: podman inspect works on all classes other then artifacts.
body:
### Issue Description

podman inspect should fail over to podman artifact inspect, just like all of the other classes.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman artifact create ...
2. podman inspect (FAIL)
3.


### Describe the results you received

 podman inspect  quay.io/rhatdan/graniteb
[]
Error: no such object: "quay.io/rhatdan/graniteb"


### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected$ podman artifact inspect  quay.io/rhatdan/granite
{
